caption: A man with short dark hair and a beard is seated in a studio against a dark gray, textured acoustic foam wall. He wears large black over-ear headphones and a black zip-up jacket over a gray shirt. A professional silver condenser microphone on a black boom arm is positioned directly in front of his face. Throughout the sequence, the man's head shifts slightly as he looks in different directions. He begins by looking forward with a neutral expression, then glances toward the upper right, shifts his gaze back toward the center, and finally looks further to the right with a slight lift of his eyebrows. His facial expression remains relatively calm and attentive as he subtly adjusts his posture and gaze across the frames. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
